name: UBA : Windows Access with Service or Machine Account
notes:
Detects any interactive session (such as RDP or local login) that is initiated by a service or machine account in Windows Server.

Note: Accounts are listed in the UBA : Service, Machine Account reference set. Edit this list to add or remove any accounts to flag from your environment.
conditions_text: when the event context is Local to Local, Remote to Local
when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when any of Username are contained in any of UBA : Service, Machine Account - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
when the event QID is one of the following (5000945) Success Audit: The domain controller validated the credentials for an account
when Source Workstation (custom) equals Machine Identifier (custom)
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Windows Access with Service or Machine Account on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event context is Local to Local, Remote to Local
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when any of Username are contained in any of UBA : Service, Machine Account - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5000945) Success Audit: The domain controller validated the credentials for an account
AND when Source Workstation (custom) equals Machine Identifier (custom)
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Windows Access with Service or Machine Account
